Sprint Planning Notes — Sprint 43: The team committed to 64 story points for the two-week sprint beginning March 11. Top priorities are the user profile redesign (18 points), database migration to PostgreSQL 15 (12 points), and the webhook delivery reliability improvements (10 points). Two bugs from the previous sprint were carried over: the timezone display issue (3 points) and the CSV export encoding bug (5 points). The team noted capacity constraints due to two engineers attending a conference in week two.
